title: sairocarpus costatus
intro: Sairocarpus costatus is a plant species within the family Plantaginaceae. It is also known as the Himalayan foxglove, and is native to the Himalayan region. Sairocarpus costatus is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
